name: National Treasury System
description: Integration with Ministry of Finance treasury management system for budget allocations and fund transfers
notes: Critical system for all financial transactions

name: Bank of Zambia Reporting
description: Regulatory reporting system for financial SOEs to submit required filings to Bank of Zambia
notes: Mandatory for ZANACO and other financial institutions

name: ZESCO ERP System
description: SAP ERP system integration for operational and financial data from ZESCO
notes: Real-time operational metrics for energy sector monitoring

name: Environmental Compliance Portal
description: Integration with Zambia Environmental Management Agency (ZEMA) for compliance reporting
notes: Required for all mining and manufacturing SOEs

name: NAPSA Payroll Integration
description: National Pension Scheme Authority integration for employee pension contributions
notes: Statutory requirement for all SOEs with employees

name: ZRA Tax Reporting
description: Zambia Revenue Authority tax filing and compliance system
notes: All SOEs must submit monthly and quarterly tax filings

name: LuSE Trading System
description: Lusaka Securities Exchange integration for listed SOEs stock information

name: PACRA Company Registry
description: Patents and Companies Registration Agency system for corporate governance filings
notes: Mandatory annual filings for all SOEs

name: GRZ Document Management
description: Government of Republic of Zambia central document repository
notes: Secure system for sensitive government documents

name: SAP S/4HANA Analytics
description: Centralized analytics platform aggregating data from multiple SOE ERP systems
notes: IDC's central analytics hub for cross-SOE analysis

name: Whistleblower Platform
description: Third-party ethics and whistleblower management system
notes: Anonymous reporting system for all SOEs

name: Mining Cadastre Portal
description: Ministry of Mines mining license and compliance tracking system
notes: For KAGEM, Mopani, and other mining SOEs
